articles.description: Splashing down in the Pacific Ocean, the crew traveled approximately 694,481 miles and reached a record distance from Earth. , Technology & Science, Times Now
articles.content:
In this image from video provided by NASA, the Artemis II Orion capsule splashes down in the Pacific Ocean on Friday.

articles.title: IBM to pay $17 million in anti-DEI settlement
articles.description: By Auzinea Bacon, CNN (CNN) — IBM reached a settlement with the federal government on Friday, agreeing to pay roughly $17 million to resolve allegations of illegal diversity, equity and inclusion (DEI) practices. articles.title: Tesla's supervised self-driving software gets Dutch okay, first in Europe
articles.description: AMSTERDAM/SAN FRANCISCO, April 10 (Reuters) - Dutch regulators approved the use of Tesla's driver ⁠assistance software which handles most driving tasks on highways and city streets under human ‌supervision, in the first regulatory sign‑off for the technology in Europe.

articles.title: Consumer Reports warns of rising AI scams targeting banks, IRS, and job seekers
articles.description: It seems like AI technology is getting better by the day. Scammers know that and are determined to pull a fast one.
articles.content:
It seems like AI technology is getting better by the day. Scammers know that and are determined to pull a fast one.
Whether it’s a bogus call from your bank, a fake email from the IRS, or a phony job listing, more people are losing more money than ev... [2201 chars]

articles.title: Police: Rohnert Park high school locked down after reported threat, Bonnie Avenue closed
articles.description: A Nixle alert sent out around 2:30 p.m. urged the public to avoid Bonnie Avenue and surrounding streets while law enforcement investigated the alleged threat at Technology High School.
articles.content:
Police closed a section of Bonnie Avenue on Friday, April 10, while investigating a reported threat that prompted a lockdown at Technology High School in Rohnert Park.
The Rohnert Park Department of Public Safety said Bonnie Avenue is closed between ... [1868 chars]

articles.title: Banks Warned About Anthropic’s New, Powerful A.I. Technology
articles.description: In an unusual move, the Treasury secretary and the Federal Reserve chair gathered bank executives to caution about cyberthreats posed by artificial intelligence.
articles.content: The leaders of some of America’s largest banks were warned by a top government official this week about a new artificial intelligence model from Anthropic that could lead to heightened risks of cyberattacks, according to three people briefed on the m... [1761 chars]

articles.title: Fast Breeder Nuclear Reactor major milestone for India’s self- reliant Energy Security: Dr Jitendra
articles.description: Excelsior Correspondent NEW DELHI, Apr 10: Addressing the VAKTAVYA 2026 organised by Hindu College, Union Minister of State (Independent Charge) for Science & Technology; Earth Sciences and Minister of State for PMO, Personnel, Public Grievances and Pensions, Department of Atomic Energy and Department of Space, Dr. Jitendra Singh highlighted the significance of India’s indigenously developed Prototype Fast Breeder Reactor (PFBR), stating that it marks a major milestone in India’s journey towards self- reliant Energy Security.
